en.extract:
The yellow-bibbed fruit dove or yellow-banded fruit dove (Ptilinopus solomonensis) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is found in the Bismarck and Solomon Islands archipelagos. The Geelvink fruit dove (P. speciosus) was formerly considered conspecific, but was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.

The '''yellow-bibbed fruit dove''' or '''yellow-banded fruit dove''' ('''''Ptilinopus solomonensis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Columbidae]]. It is found in the [[Bismarck Archipelago|Bismarck]] and [[Solomon Islands (archipelago)|Solomon Islands]] archipelagos. The [[Geelvink fruit dove]] (''P. speciosus'') was formerly considered conspecific, but was split as a distinct species by the [[International Ornithologists' Union|IOC]] in 2021.<ref>{{Cite web|title=Species Updates – IOC World Bird List|url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/updates/species-updates/|access-date=2021-06-13|language=en-US}}</ref>

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.

zh.extract:
黄胸果鸠（台湾作黃領果鳩）（学名：Ptilinopus solomonensis），是鸽形目鸠鸽科的一种鸟类。


特征
黄胸果鸠体重约108.48克，翼长约115.2毫米，嘴峰长约17.9毫米，喙宽度约4.3毫米，喙厚度约4.1毫米，跗蹠长约19.9毫米，尾长约65.8毫米。黄胸果鸠在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在半开放的高大的树木组成的森林中，食性为草食性，主要食物来源是水果。


亚种
P. s. speciosus：分布于农福尔岛、比亚克岛和雅本岛。
P. s. johannis：分布于阿德默勒尔蒂群岛、圣马蒂亚斯群岛和新汉诺威岛。
P. s. meyeri：分布于新不列颠岛及附近岛屿。
P. s. neumanni：分布于格林群岛（所罗门群岛西部）。
P. s. bistictus：分布于所罗门群岛（布干维尔岛和布卡岛）。
P. s. vulcanorum：分布于所罗门群岛西南部。
P. s. ocularis：分布于瓜达尔卡纳尔岛（所罗门群岛东南部）。
P. s. ambiguus：分布于马莱塔岛（所罗门群岛东部）。
P. s. solomonensis：分布于所罗门群岛（马基拉岛和乌基岛）。
